RC522_DESCRIPTION: Blocks for the RC522 RFID reader and MIFARE Classic cards.
RC522_CONSTRUCTOR_MESSAGE0: create $[CONSTRUCTED_VAR_NAME] on SPI $[SPI_INSTANCE] with CS pin $[CS_PIN]
RC522_MIFARECONSTRUCTOR_TOOLTIP: Create MIFARE Classic block access for an RC522 reader
RC522_READCARD_TOOLTIP: Return the card UID, or null when no card is present
RC522_FORMATUID_TOOLTIP: Format a UID as uppercase hexadecimal
RC522_HALT_TOOLTIP: Put the selected card into the HALT state
RC522_AUTHENTICATE_MESSAGE0: $[MIFARE_INSTANCE] authenticate UID $[UID] block $[BLOCK] with key $[KEY] type $[KEY_TYPE]
RC522_AUTHENTICATE_TOOLTIP: Authenticate the sector containing a block
